title: Nonogram Solver
subtitle: Reinforcement Learning (RL)

demoInstructions.lead: Generate a new Nonogram puzzle, then watch the agent solve it step-by-step.
bullets: Click “New Puzzle” to generate a board.
Once it’s ready, the button switches to “Solve With AI”. Click it to start solving.
Use “Solution” to reveal the full answer key if you want to compare.
If AWS is warming up, wait for the status to turn ready and try again.

problem: I wanted to see if an RL agent could learn to solve Nonogram puzzles.
actions: Generated large batches of 5x5 puzzles and trained a hybrid CNN + Transformer policy network to solve them.
Shaped rewards around unique guesses, row/column completions, and full-board solves to guide exploration.
results: Achieved strong solve rates on held-out 5x5 boards (see GitHub for evaluation details).
notes: The solver focuses on generated 5x5 puzzles; scaling to larger puzzles would need curriculum learning or search.
